author: Jim Eric Skogman
name: Autoresearch Low-Rank-Q + Final-Tail-Q + Tied-Embedding Float (1x5090)
blurb: Non-record 1xRTX5090 autoresearch submission from jadechip/autoresearch-parameter-golf. The README documents a two-campaign search arc from 1.733958794 to 1.535119154 across 188 measured runs; the packaged runnable snapshot is the accepted best commit 905cc4d at post-quant val_bpb 1.529478563, using a compact low-rank-Q carrier, selective attention-QAT-off, delayed MLP fake quant, final-tail full-rank Q, and fp16 tied-embedding export.
